title: Figure 7 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 7 Amphisphaeria oleae (MFLU 26-0124). a. Substrate; b. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); c. Vertical section through ascoma; d. Vertical section through ostiolar canal; e. Peridium; f. Paraphyses; g–j. Asci; k. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; l–t. Ascospores. Scale bars: 200 μm (c); 50 μm (d); 20 μm (g–j); 10 μm (e, k–t); 5 μm (f).
